name: deepfakeshield-web
description: Advanced Scam & Phishing Detection Suite — Monorepo

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null; uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
